Block.Para: An Act to amend the Radiocommunication Act (voluntary organizations that provide emergency services)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
This enactment amends the Radiocommunication Act to provide that no fee may be charged for the issuance of a radio licence to a voluntary organization that provides emergency services.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Radiocommunication (voluntary organizations that provide emergency services)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the Radiocommunication Act (voluntary organizations that provide emergency services)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. The Radiocommunication Act is amended by adding the following after section 6:

Para.change: 6.1 (1) The following definitions apply in this section.

Block.MarginalNote:
âemergency servicesâ
Â« services dâurgence Â»

Para.change: âemergency servicesâ means fire, ambulance, search and rescue and other related services provided in an emergency situation.

Block.MarginalNote:
âvoluntary organizationâ
Â« organisme bÃ©nÃ©vole Â»

Para.change: âvoluntary organizationâ means an organization that is primarily staffed by volunteers.
(2) Notwithstanding paragraph 6(1)(l), no fee may be charged for the issuance of a radio licence to a voluntary organization that provides emergency services.

Block.Para:
Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
